meaning: n.浪姆酒(用甘蔗或糖蜜等酿制的一种甜酒)adj.古怪的,奇特的
examples: Rum, a strong alcoholic drink, which is distilled from sugar cane, is also an export.
American tourists enjoy stocking up on inexpensive high quality Caribbean rum while they're on vacation.
His favourite tipple was rum and lemon.
The raisins, for example, have to be soaked in rum for at least 24 hours.
Tojo had taken too much of a liking to the rum and other beverages.
